_doc: Active wallet-selection config pointer, mirroring the trading-config manifest pattern (versioned JSON files, manifest selects the live one). Bump 'active'/'activeByPhilosophy' to roll the rating engine onto a new version; keep old versions for reproducibility.

activeByPhilosophy._doc: The live config file per philosophy bake-off. The four HL scorers read the file named here; bump to roll a scorer onto a new version.

versions.note: copyability: minClosedRoundTrips 8->5, config-driven flag/disqualifier/band thresholds + tradingActivity (EDT watch-window) section
